rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1097 authorizes a council to solicit and accept gifts and grants for subchapter purposes. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The council may solicit and accept gifts, grants, and donations for the purposes of this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule concerns gift/grant acceptance authority and is unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
